mapper.select: SELECT C.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, RC.PLAY_TIME AS playTime, RC.HINT_COUNT AS hintCount, RC.PLAYER_COUNT AS peopleCount, RO.OPEN_AT AS playDate, RC.RECORD_COMMENT AS comment FROM RECORD RC JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD ON RC.DETAIL_ID = AD.DETAIL_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RS ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RS.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY P ON RS.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON P.PARTY_ID = PR.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM C ON RO.ROOM_ID = C.ROOM_ID WHERE AD.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY RO.OPEN_AT DESC
